name: C-17 compliance-remove --dry-run reports the planned removal without mutating the catalog
command: printf -- '- id: custom-framework\n  url: https://x.com\n' > cat.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-remove.sh" custom-framework --catalog cat.yaml --dry-run 2>err.txt && grep -q 'dry-run' err.txt && grep -q '^- id: custom-framework' cat.yaml && echo skipped 1>&2
